scenarios.description: parse(html non-empty, baseUri non-empty) returns parsed Document covering Parser.parse(html,baseUri)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a Document whose html() contains the original non-empty HTML and baseUri matches provided URI
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parse html with baseUri

scenarios.description: parse(html empty, baseUri empty) returns empty body Document
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a Document whose body html() is empty string and baseUri equals ""
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O1 parse empty html and empty baseUri

scenarios.description: parse(html null) throws IllegalArgumentException for null html input
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O1 parse null html throws

scenarios.description: parse(html non-empty, parser non-null) uses parser.parseInput and returns Document
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a Document produced by parser.parseInput(html, baseUri)
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parse with custom parser
String html = "<div/>"; String baseUri=""; Parser parser=Parser.xmlParser();

scenarios.description: parse(html non-empty, parser null) throws IllegalArgumentException for null parser
pseudocode: TEST TC05_O2 parse with null parser throws
String html = "<p/>"; String baseUri=""; Parser parser = null;

scenarios.description: parse(File file exists, charsetName non-null, baseUri non-empty) returns Document via DataUtil.load
scenarios.precondition: existing temporary HTML file with content "F"; charsetName="UTF-8"
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a Document whose span text is F and baseUri equals provided baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC06_O3 parse file with charset and baseUri
File tmp = createTempFile("test.html","F"); String cs="UTF-8"; String baseUri="http://f/";

existing temporary HTML file no meta charset with content "

U

"
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a Document whose paragraph text is U and baseUri equals file absolute path
pseudocode: TEST TC07_O3 parse file with null charset

U

"); String cs = null;

scenarios.description: parse(URL with unsupported protocol) throws MalformedURLException before timeout
scenarios.precondition: URL url = new URL("ftp://example.com"); int timeout=1000;
pseudocode: TEST TC09_O16 parse URL unsupported protocol throws

scenarios.description: parse(URL http, timeout=0) returns Document by immediate GET via Connection.get()
scenarios.precondition: embedded HTTP server on localhost: returns "<t>OK</t>"; URL url=new URL("http://localhost:8888"); int timeout=0
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a Document whose tag t text is OK
pseudocode: TEST TC10_O16 parse URL GET returns ok
startLocalHttpServer(8888, "<t>OK</t>"); URL url=new URL("http://localhost:8888"); int timeout=0;
